lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ && cd frontend && npm run lint

appliedUpdates.description: Documented icon generation pipeline limitation: generate-icons.mjs regenerates all icons nondeterministically, so adding a single icon requires a focused temporary script instead of the full pipeline.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: When generating new icons, do NOT run the full generate-icons.mjs script as it regenerates all 21 icons nondeterministically. Instead, create a temporary focused script that generates only the needed icon using the same technical requirements (framer-motion, SVGProps, viewBox 0 0 24 24, currentColor, strokeWidth 1.5).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature regenerate-brainstorm-icon worker correctly identified this limitation and used the alternative approach described in the feature spec. Documenting in AGENTS.md prevents future workers from wasting time.

rejectedObservations.observation: The generate-icons.mjs script contains a hardcoded Gemini API key. Pre-existing issue not introduced by this feature.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: .factory/library/voidpilot-knowledge.md documents 'Hardcoded fallback API key' as known tech debt. This applies to frontend scripts too. Not a new finding.
